user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Eggs Benedict
fields.short_description: A timeless breakfast favorite featuring poached eggs and Canadian bacon on a toasted English muffin, topped with a light hollandaise sauce.
fields.meal_suggestion: Poach two large eggs until the whites are set but the yolks remain runny. Place over toasted whole-wheat English muffin halves topped with warmed Canadian bacon. Drizzle with a small amount of lemon-infused hollandaise sauce and garnish with fresh chives.
fields.nutrition_note: High-quality protein from eggs and Canadian bacon supports muscle maintenance. Using a whole-wheat muffin increases fiber content. While hollandaise adds flavor, using it sparingly keeps saturated fat levels in check.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user requested an egg-based breakfast for the day with the 'Smoky' dinner. Day 4 contains the 'Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Variation', which corresponds to the 'Smoky Base Pork Dinner' theme mentioned in the query. Position -1 appends this classic option to the existing breakfast list for that day.
